.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build job.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-war-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JAXB API version to a more recent release.
pom.xml.why_exists: While not strictly breaking for compilation if the artifact exists, updating ensures compatibility with newer build tools and potential transitive dependency conflicts in a Java 21 environment.
